data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona onboards new staff with a corporate template. However, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this scenario has been executed or validated. The linked use case and prior steps do not provide specific outcomes or results related to this onboarding process, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the onboarding scenario being executed or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for onboarding scenario
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the onboarding scenario.
